title: Spacey's better craftables
description:
a mod that adds lost crafting recipes and vanilla plus items!
enjoy :)
body:
**Unleash your creativity and expand your crafting possibilities with the Craftable Plus mod for Minecraft! This mod empowers players to craft a wider range of items that were previously uncraftable, including some of the most coveted treasures in the game.**

## features:

- Craft Golden Apples: No longer depend solely on your adventures to find Golden Apples.

- Create Totems of Undying: Secure your survival with Totems of Undying by crafting them.

- craft the trident: another way of obtaining them, still a fair recipe that is posible only after you early game.


## How to Use:

Simply install the mod and explore the expanded crafting menu. Find new recipes for your favorite uncraftable items and enhance your Minecraft experience by crafting essential and rare items with ease.

## extras:

adds two types of swords the super netherite sword and the super diamond sword.

### super diamond sword:

features a balanced crafting recipe including 1 diamond block 1 gold ingot two blaze rods and 1 item upgrader* dealing 10 damage (5 hearts) and a lightning power.

### super netherite sword

using 1 netherite block, 1 netherite ingot, 2 blaze rods and 1 item upgrader*
you will unlock the power of 15 damage (7.5 hearts) attack speed of 2.0 instead of 1.6 and a master ability with cooldown that deals extra damage.

### item upgrader

the item upgrader is used for recipes like the super netherite and diamond swords and one of the 3 ways to craft a golden apple, obtaind by using an ink sac leather and bottle of XP.
